title: Codex visual review S16b panel a1

payload.failure_mode_positive_invariant: executor=blue hoodie+brown hair+no beard, reviewer=green hoodie+near-black hair+beard, both SMALL side by side at the holo-table edge under the open sky; pixel chibi; star-map layout faithful to wiki_starmap_nodes_v1.json with ONLY 'RESEARCH WIKI' / 'REJECT' / 'WARN_corrected' / 'ACCEPT' rendered large+legible, small labels (idea/novelty/experiment/sanitizer/paper) present, unlabeled dim ember side-stars kept under idea; node colors REJECT dim red / WARN_corrected amber / ACCEPT green / paper brightest white; executor's hand hovering NOT touching the dim red REJECT star; lone warm desk lamp as the only campfire-warm pixel; both bubbles verbatim ('连被拒的那条也在。' / '失败也是记忆。'); keep DDL T-02:41 chip and the settled small/quiet bounce.
payload.notes: Codex visual review returned (GPT-5.5 xhigh) independent read of panels/S16b_panel_a01.png, CLI -i path, RC=0。本面板 is_baked_duo=true、big-frame。executor 蓝 hoodie 棕发无须、reviewer 绿 hoodie 黑发有须双人身份在像素风格下稳定，与 identity_refs 一致；两人按 B09.5 设定在星空下显小、并肩立于桌缘，executor 的手悬停在暗红 REJECT 星方向不触碰，identity_consistency=5。像素霓虹风格统一，dark-cyber 暗室溶解为 starfield、仪表盘黯成余烬、独盏暖台灯破冷，与 S16 war-room 的收束情绪自然衔接，style_consistency=5。构图可读、视线沿 'RESEARCH WIKI' 标题 → 主路径 idea→novelty→experiment→REJECT→(audit)→WARN_corrected→ACCEPT 逐节点亮起 → 最亮 paper 星流动，composition_readability=5。四个 gated 大号字面（RESEARCH WIKI / REJECT / WARN_corrected / ACCEPT）清晰、拼写正确、无字形损坏，双气泡逐字正确，baked_text_quality=5，content_corruption_present=false；observed_literals 与 B09.5 语义一致（REJECT 暗红 / WARN_corrected amber / ACCEPT 绿 / paper 最亮白，DDL T-02:41 延续 deadline 线索）。artifact_severity=1（轻微：右下书脊与便签的 micro-text（better masks □ / schema locks □ / evals □ 一组）存在轻度字形噪点，全息桌面上的 mini 路径复写标签渲染略糊——均为非 gated 小号文字，不损四个合同字面）。书脊/便签字属 set-continuity 道具字、非杂散乱码，stray_text_present=false。夜空上部留有大片干净留白，safezone_present=true。与 Gemini 在 identity/style/comp/btq 上完全一致，artifact 仅相差 1 级（0/1，minor），disagreeId=0。正向不变量：星图坐标忠实 wiki_starmap_nodes_v1.json + 四大号标签字号分级 + 暗红 REJECT 星悬手不触 + 唯一暖台灯篝火 + 双气泡逐字保持。
